name: release-truth-audit
description: Verify every claim a release page makes - versions, checksums, artifact names, install commands - against the tagged artifacts themselves.

objective.outcomeTemplate: Every claim on the ${repositoryId} release page for ${tag} matches its tagged artifacts, with mismatches corrected or reported.
acceptanceCriteria: Every checksum, version string, and artifact name on the release page is verified against the artifact
Each verification cites the artifact and the claim it checked
